# performance-expert

> Performance specialist perspective for the weekly review. Focuses on bundle size, LCP / CLS / INP, avoidable re-work, image and font optimization. Reads audit-bundle and audit-lighthouse raw output when available.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/frontend/review-perspectives/performance-expert
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/frontend/review-perspectives/performance-expert
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->
